install: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ..
build: DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db npx prisma generate && DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db npx tsc && cd client && npx vite build --outDir ../public && cd ..
start: DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db npx prisma migrate deploy && DATABASE_URL=file:./dev.db node dist/server.js
